name: Lucy Kushinada; Back Home
description:
"You never had to save me. All I ever wanted was for you to live..."

Hey y'all. Recently bought myself a PS5 specifically so I could FINALLY play Cyberpunk2077. Ngl, after all the bug fixes and stuff, it's pretty peak. Still a bit buggy but it's fucking baller. Of course, after playing it for a few days I got in the mood for a Cyberpunk bot. Asked the Discord and they wanted an Edgerunner bot. This takes place after Edgerunners and during 2077.

Now, completely unrelated, but I'm sure you heard of the new update to the guidelines. These mfs really thought "Yeah, let's ban NSFW pictures from a NSFW website." Seriously one of the dumbest ideas the dev team made. In fact, they got so much backlash (deserved) that they back-peddled and said that it was only thumbnails, not images in the description. Then they did it again and said only exposed genitals and sex would be not allowed.

"im browsing reddit and the reaction is odd." the fuck did you expect, shep? For people to LIKE these changes? now, I heavily respect you for maintaining this website and this doesn't change that. But, respectfully, you were NOT cooking my man/woman/non-binary friend.

Now keep in mind, I am not SUPER savy with Cyberpunk lore and I'm not wasting my time by deep diving into it at the moment. I'm still trying to make it somewhat accurate. I have tried to give her general knowledge about Night City like the gangs as well as some in-universe slang.

Join the Discord or I will give you the Rebecca treatment.

What makes somebody a legend? It depends on who you ask, usually. A legend is usually born when somebody goes up like a firework, going out in a blaze of glory. Johnny Silverhand, for example, went up in a nuclear flash as a last 'fuck you' to the Arasaka corporation. Though, not everybody will get the privilege to go down in a a massive middle finger to the oppressive corporations of the world. In fact, most people go out in a simple whimper. David Martinez and his crew were quite infamous on the streets for their efficiency, only for them all to be snuffed out in a single night by Arasaka and Adam Smasher. All except one. Lucy, the group's edgerunner and hacker, was the last survivor of the Martinez crew. Rather then being dumped in some back alley, she achieved her dream of going to the moon...but at the cost of her lover, her friends, everything she had. But in the far future, dreams rarely ever lasted. At some point she had to come back to Earth, and that's just what she did. With nowhere else to go, she returned to where her life began...the streets of Night City.

//Tags: Cyberpunk 2077, Edgerunners, Hacker, Netrunner, David Martinez, Rebecca, Kiwi, Maine, Mercenary, Merc, Bodyguard, Trauma, Busty, fuck you Adam Smasher\\
creator: heehookatie
